metadata.task: Determine which object reaches the bottom of the ramp first, and report the ramp friction coefficient used in the scene. Output two numbers: object_id, ramp_friction.
metadata.description: Release or step the disk and box on the ramp and track which object reaches the bottom first. Query the ramp parameters for the friction value, then return the observed winning object id and friction coefficient.

expected_behavior: The LLM should interact with the scene, noting that the disk reaches the bottom first due to rolling motion (lower effective friction).
reasoning: Object_1 is the disk and object_2 is the box. On the ramp with friction coefficient 0.2, the disk is expected to reach the bottom first, so the numeric answer is object id 1 and ramp friction 0.2.
